subcodes.first_line: Dear and cherished friend! Thy noble letter was received and its contents brought solace to my heart. Verily, at such a time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست عزیز مهربان نامه نامی وارد و مضمون تسلی خاطر گشت فی الحقیقه در چنین وقتی
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @consolation and comfort
